notes: Bogomolov H-construction contrarian spread pairs trade (deterministic, no ML, no external feed). 'H' = Bogomolov H-statistic (h_mult*stdev of the log-spread over a bounded formation window), NOT the Hurst exponent. Three host/partner pairs: EURUSD/GBPUSD (slots 0/1), AUDUSD/NZDUSD (slots 2/3), XAUUSD/XAGUSD (slots 4/5). Host leg via framework magic; partner via QM_BasketOpenPosition at its slot; equal-notional half-risk per leg; both legs open/close together. Per-D1-bar H-volatility qualification on a rolling 252-bar formation window. All six legs in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv. Modeled on sibling QM5_11240_ht-dist-pairs.
